title: Death SMP
description: This Modpack is for the Death SMP Server
body:
Hi Guys, this is an Modpack for Normal Survival which addes some Features to Minecraft like Better Preformance nicer Looks Shaders and more!
This is the Modpack is made for the Death SMP (German Server). It is Recommendet to use but if you only want an Normal Survival Modpack this is the Right one too. Its has Mods for Performance and Game Experience

In Later versions it has Loots of cool new Features
